name: agent-orchestrator
description: Route work across AI models, CLI harnesses, local models, and multi-agent swarms.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate and swarm tasks across AI harnesses and models
interface.longDescription: Agent Orchestrator detects configured AI harnesses and local models, then routes tasks through delegate and swarm workflows with cost, privacy, and capability policies.
defaultPrompt: Set up Agent Orchestrator for this machine.
Use a swarm to validate this plan.
Delegate this task to the best available route.
